description: Curated sports surname/name-equity signals for CSC Brand Strength interpretation. Only high-confidence heritage brands — avoid common surnames that would false-positive.

manning.label: Manning family legacy
manning.prose_fragment: Manning family brand equity — one of the most recognized surnames in American football
manning.insight: surname heritage supplies national recognition and trust transfer that pure follower metrics understate

mahomes.label: Mahomes family legacy
mahomes.prose_fragment: Mahomes family brand equity tied to elite QB pedigree and national recognition
mahomes.insight: family-name recognition amplifies commercial pull beyond measured social reach alone

griffin.label: Griffin family legacy
griffin.insight: family athletic pedigree adds recognition beyond the athlete's own measured channels

harbaugh.label: Harbaugh family legacy
harbaugh.insight: coaching-and-playing family recognition strengthens market familiarity

kelly.label: Kelly family legacy
kelly.insight: multi-generation athletic recognition supports broader consumer familiarity

williams.label: Williams tennis legacy
williams.insight: global family tennis recognition is a primary brand asset

woods.label: Woods golf legacy
woods.insight: golf family-name recognition carries outsized commercial meaning

griffey.insight: multi-generation MLB surname recognition compounds personal brand strength
